name: moment
use_when: Construct a moment from a JS Date / ISO string. Chain to compute offsets.

name: moment.add
use_when: Add N units to a date. Units: 'days', 'weeks', 'months', 'years' (and short forms 'd', 'M', 'y').

name: moment.subtract
use_when: Subtract N units from a date.

name: moment.startOf
use_when: Snap to the start of a unit: 'day', 'month', 'year', 'week'.

name: moment.endOf
use_when: Snap to the end of a unit. Common for setting maxDate to end-of-month.

name: moment.month
use_when: Read or set the month index (Jan = 0). Use for fixed-month scheduling (e.g. Feb / Aug slots).

name: moment.format
use_when: Render the date as a string. Used to append month/year to visit names (e.g. 'MMM YYYY').

name: moment.toDate
use_when: Convert back to a native Date. scheduleBuilder.add expects Date for earliestDate / maxDate.
